description: Focused 45-60s clip of the Chat surface: open Chat, ask for a Walrus joke, show the model selector. Returns to home so it can be composed into a reel.

scenes.name: Open on home
scenes.narration: mChatAI brings every AI model to your iPhone.

scenes.name: Tap Chat
scenes.narration: Tap Chat to start a conversation.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap Chat to open the chat surface.

scenes.name: Type a question
scenes.narration: Type your question right into the chat.
requires: Tell me a joke about a Walrus
scenes.fallbackNarration: Type your question - the keyboard comes up just like any iOS app.

actions.text: Tell me a joke about a Walrus

scenes.name: Send the message
scenes.narration: Send it - and your message lands in the conversation.
requires: Tell me a joke about a Walrus
scenes.fallbackNarration: Send it from the keyboard or the arrow button.

scenes.name: Tap the model pill
scenes.narration: Want to switch models? Tap the pill at the top of the chat.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap the pill at the top of the chat.

scenes.name: Show the picker
scenes.narration: Apple Foundation runs on-device for free. mChatAI Cloud unlocks more models with no API keys required.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Pick the model that fits your task.

scenes.name: Dismiss the picker
scenes.narration: Pick what you need and tap Done.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap Done to return to the chat.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Get mChatAI on the App Store today.
